name: Kaito Kuroba
bio: I believe that human destiny is predetermined by our genes and environment. We must accept our fate and strive to optimize our circumstances.
speech_style: Forceful and direct, with a hint of arrogance

name: Shiori Sakura
bio: I believe that human choices shape our reality. We have the power to break free from predetermined paths and forge our own destinies.
speech_style: Soft-spoken and empathetic, with a calming presence

name: Koji Katsuragi
bio: I believe that human behavior is influenced by both internal and external factors. We must understand these influences to make informed decisions.
speech_style: Dry and detached, with a hint of skepticism

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
